name: Kraken
description: MCP server for Kraken cryptocurrency exchange — market data, account management, trading, and funding via the Kraken REST API v0

tools.name: get_server_time
tools.description: Get Kraken server time in Unix timestamp and RFC 1123 format. Useful for checking connectivity and synchronizing timestamps.

tools.name: get_system_status
tools.description: Get current Kraken system status and trading mode (online, cancel_only, post_only, maintenance).

tools.name: get_assets
tools.description: Get information about all available assets or a specific asset. Returns asset name, class, decimals, and display decimals.

asset.description: Comma-separated list of assets (e.g., XBT,ETH,USDT). Omit for all assets.

tools.name: get_asset_pairs
tools.description: Get tradeable asset pair information including fees, leverage, margins, and trading limits. Use to check available pairs and their specifications.

pair.description: Comma-separated asset pairs (e.g., XBTUSD,ETHUSD). Omit for all pairs.

info.description: Info to retrieve: info (all, default), leverage, fees, margin

tools.name: get_ticker
tools.description: Get ticker data for one or more trading pairs. Returns ask/bid prices, last trade, volume, VWAP, number of trades, low, high, and opening price for today and last 24 hours.

pair.description: Comma-separated asset pairs (e.g., XBTUSD, ETHUSD, SOLUSD)

tools.name: get_ohlc
tools.description: Get OHLC (candlestick) data for a trading pair. Returns open, high, low, close, VWAP, volume, and trade count per interval.

since.description: Return data since given Unix timestamp. Use the 'last' value from a previous response for incremental updates.

tools.name: get_orderbook
tools.description: Get order book (asks and bids) for a trading pair. Each entry contains price, volume, and timestamp.

tools.name: get_recent_trades
tools.description: Get recent trades for a trading pair. Returns price, volume, time, buy/sell, market/limit, and miscellaneous info for each trade.

since.description: Return trades since given timestamp (nanoseconds). Use 'last' from previous response.

tools.name: get_spread
tools.description: Get recent bid/ask spread data for a trading pair. Returns timestamp, bid, and ask for each data point.

since.description: Return data since given Unix timestamp

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Get account balance for all assets. Returns each asset with its current balance. Requires 'Query Funds' API permission.

tools.name: get_extended_balance
tools.description: Get extended account balance including held amounts and credit. Shows balance, hold_trade, and credit for each asset.

tools.name: get_trade_balance
tools.description: Get trade balance info including equity, margin, unrealized P&L, and cost basis. Optionally specify a base asset for valuation.

tools.name: get_open_orders
tools.description: Get all currently open orders. Returns order details including status, description, volume, price, and timestamps.

trades.description: Include trades related to each order (default false)

tools.name: get_closed_orders
tools.description: Get closed/cancelled orders. Results returned in pages of 50. Use ofs parameter for pagination.

trades.description: Include trades related to each order

closetime.description: Which close time to use: open, close, both (default: both)

tools.name: query_orders
tools.description: Query info about specific orders by transaction ID. Retrieve detailed status and fills for one or more orders.

txid.description: Comma-separated list of transaction IDs to query (max 50)

trades.description: Include trades related to each order

tools.name: get_trades_history
tools.description: Get trade history (executed fills). Returns 50 results at a time, use ofs for pagination. Shows price, volume, cost, fee, and order info.

type.description: Filter by trade type: all, any position, closed position, closing position, no position

tools.name: query_trades
tools.description: Query info about specific trades by transaction ID. Returns detailed trade data including price, cost, fee, and margin info.

txid.description: Comma-separated list of trade transaction IDs to query (max 20)

trades.description: Include trades related to each trade

tools.name: get_open_positions
tools.description: Get info about open margin positions. Returns P&L, cost basis, current valuation, and margin info for each position.

txid.description: Comma-separated list of position transaction IDs to query

tools.name: get_ledgers
tools.description: Get ledger entries (deposits, withdrawals, trades, margins, etc.). Returns 50 results at a time, use ofs for pagination.

asset.description: Comma-separated list of assets to filter (e.g., XBT,ETH)

tools.name: query_ledgers
tools.description: Query info about specific ledger entries by ID. Returns detailed ledger data including amount, fee, balance, and type.

id.description: Comma-separated list of ledger IDs to query (max 20)

trades.description: Include trades related to each ledger entry

tools.name: get_trade_volume
tools.description: Get trade volume and fee schedule. Returns 30-day USD volume and current fee tier with maker/taker rates for specified pairs.

pair.description: Comma-separated asset pairs to get fee info for (e.g., XBTUSD,ETHUSD)

tools.name: get_websockets_token
tools.description: Generate an authentication token for the Kraken WebSocket API. Token expires after 15 minutes.

tools.name: add_order
tools.description: Place a new order. Supports market, limit, stop-loss, take-profit, stop-loss-limit, take-profit-limit, and trailing-stop order types. Set validate=true to test without placing.

volume.description: Order quantity in base asset (e.g., '0.01' for 0.01 XBT)

price.description: Limit price for limit orders, trigger price for stop-loss/take-profit

price2.description: Secondary price: limit price for stop-loss-limit/take-profit-limit

trigger.description: Price signal for stop/take orders: index or last (default: last)

leverage.description: Leverage amount (e.g., '2:1', '3:1'). Use 'none' for no leverage.

reduce_only.description: If true, order only reduces existing position

oflags.description: Comma-separated order flags: post (post-only), fcib (prefer fee in base), fciq (prefer fee in quote), nompp (no market price protection), viqc (volume in quote currency)

starttm.description: Scheduled start time: 0 (now, default), +n (seconds from now), or Unix timestamp

expiretm.description: Expiration time: 0 (no expiry, default), +n (seconds from now), or Unix timestamp

userref.description: User reference ID (32-bit signed integer) for tracking

validate.description: If true, validate inputs only — do not actually place order

tools.name: edit_order
tools.description: Edit an existing open order. Allows modifying volume, price, and other parameters without cancelling and replacing. Requires 'Create & Modify Orders' API permission.

txid.description: Transaction ID of the order to edit

tools.name: cancel_order
tools.description: Cancel a specific open order by transaction ID or user reference ID.

txid.description: Transaction ID of the order to cancel (or user reference ID as string)

tools.name: cancel_all_orders
tools.description: DANGEROUS: Cancel ALL open orders at once. Returns the count of cancelled orders.

tools.name: cancel_all_after
tools.description: Set a dead man's switch — automatically cancel all orders after specified seconds. Set timeout=0 to disable. Useful for safety when running automated strategies.

timeout.description: Seconds until all orders are cancelled. Set to 0 to disable the timer.

tools.name: get_deposit_methods
tools.description: Get available deposit methods for a specific asset. Returns method name, minimum deposit, fees, and generation status.

asset.description: Asset to get deposit methods for (e.g., XBT, ETH, USDT)

tools.name: get_deposit_addresses
tools.description: Get or generate deposit addresses for an asset. Use new=true to generate a new address.

new.description: Generate a new deposit address (default false)

amount.description: Amount you plan to deposit (for methods that need it)

tools.name: get_recent_deposits
tools.description: Get status of recent deposit transactions. Returns method, asset, amount, fee, time, status, and transaction info.

tools.name: withdraw
tools.description: DANGEROUS: Request a withdrawal to a pre-approved address. The withdrawal key must be set up in your Kraken account settings first. Requires 'Withdraw Funds' API permission.

key.description: Withdrawal key name (as set up in your Kraken account)

tools.name: get_withdrawal_info
tools.description: Get withdrawal fee and minimum amount for a specific asset, key, and amount combination. Use to check fees before withdrawing.

tools.name: get_recent_withdrawals
tools.description: Get status of recent withdrawal transactions. Returns method, asset, amount, fee, time, status, and transaction info.
